Track offers without pretending they are picks.

Add sportsbook offers you are considering, compare rollover and expiry notes, and keep them separate from your public record until a real pick is locked.

    Frequently Asked Questions

    Can I cancel anytime?

    Yes! Cancel your subscription anytime. No long-term commitments or hidden fees.

    Is there a money-back guarantee?

    Absolutely. 30-day money-back guarantee if you're not satisfied with Premium.

    Can I switch tiers later?

    Yes, upgrade or downgrade your tier at any time. Changes take effect immediately.

    Do you offer team/group plans?

    Yes! Contact us for custom enterprise pricing for teams of 5+ members.

    Welcome Back

    Log in to review your record, lock another play, and keep your public profile moving from the same saved history.

    Audit your record

    Open your dashboard, recent picks, and profile stats without bouncing across multiple pages.

    Continue the workflow

    Jump back into the board, confirm lines, and submit the next pick from the same place.

    Keep your history intact

    Every login brings you back to the same public record instead of a reset or a cleaned-up slate.

    Forgot password?

    If your username and password do not match, use password reset to recover the real account tied to your email.

    Don't have an account?

    Email login is available right now

    Create Your Account

    Register once, lock your first play, and start a public sports profile that can actually be checked later.

    Free to start

    The first step is just creating the account and making a real pick. No fake prestige, no paywall required.

    Built for transparency

    Your profile exists so people can inspect your history instead of trusting one screenshot or one good week.

    Made for sports fans

    Picks, feed activity, arena rivalries, polls, and trivia all tie back to visible reputation over time.

    Already have an account?

    Frequently Asked Questions

    Can I cancel anytime?

    Yes! Cancel your subscription anytime. No long-term commitments or hidden fees.

    Is there a money-back guarantee?

    Absolutely. 30-day money-back guarantee if you're not satisfied with Premium.

    Can I switch tiers later?

    Yes, upgrade or downgrade your tier at any time. Changes take effect immediately.

    Do you offer team/group plans?

    Yes! Contact us for custom enterprise pricing for teams of 5+ members.

    Welcome Back

    Log in to review your record, lock another play, and keep your public profile moving from the same saved history.

    Audit your record

    Open your dashboard, recent picks, and profile stats without bouncing across multiple pages.

    Continue the workflow

    Jump back into the board, confirm lines, and submit the next pick from the same place.

    Keep your history intact

    Every login brings you back to the same public record instead of a reset or a cleaned-up slate.

    Forgot password?

    If your username and password do not match, use password reset to recover the real account tied to your email.

    Don't have an account?

    Email login is available right now

    Create Your Account

    Register once, lock your first play, and start a public sports profile that can actually be checked later.

    Free to start

    The first step is just creating the account and making a real pick. No fake prestige, no paywall required.

    Built for transparency

    Your profile exists so people can inspect your history instead of trusting one screenshot or one good week.

    Made for sports fans

    Picks, feed activity, arena rivalries, polls, and trivia all tie back to visible reputation over time.
